subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, et al, spoken on 1919-12-29
subcodes.first_line: I have mentioned and spoken about this subject of mathematics in the meetings in America. Now also tonight I want to say a little about it... there is a power which is very strong which will become apparent in future, such as the power of dynamite... Two-thirds of the people will perish.
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @predictions and prophecies, @power of the mind over nature, @astrology and numerology, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
